mano_cua.result_summary: Tauri 应用前端在浏览器中白屏。Console 报 Uncaught Error: Missing Axiom token (axiom.ts:4)，导致 React 完全未挂载（div#root 高度为 0）。这是环境配置缺失（Axiom API Token 未配置），非目标 bug。无法导航到设置页面、无法检查 update banner、无法测试滚动。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: App completely white screen due to Uncaught Error: Missing Axiom token in axiom.ts:4. React app failed to mount - div#root height is 0. This is an environment config issue, not the target bug. Cannot test settings page or update banner functionality.
